Enumeration Case# LOOP

LivePhotosKit JS 1.5+

```
const PlaybackStyleLiteral LOOP;
```

## [See Also](/documentation/livephotoskitjs/livephotoskit.playbackstyle/loop#see-also)

### [Enumeration Cases](/documentation/livephotoskitjs/livephotoskit.playbackstyle/loop#Enumeration-Cases)

[`FULL`](/documentation/livephotoskitjs/livephotoskit.playbackstyle/full)Play the entire motion content including transition effects at the start and end.[`HINT`](/documentation/livephotoskitjs/livephotoskit.playbackstyle/hint)Play a short section of the motion content.[`default`](/documentation/livephotoskitjs/livephotoskit.playbackstyle/default)
